_comment: Suzaku Tomb (朱雀墓) — underground tomb containing the Cultivation Planet Crystal. Canon (CANON_RI_COMPLETE_WORLD.md L52): A multi-floor tomb within Planet Suzaku containing the Cultivation Planet Crystal (the seal-mechanism of the planet itself). Wang Lin found the Half-Moon Blade here. The scattered demon Piao Nanzi/Lou Hou was sealed here. Uses the_end noise settings for a floating-island-like tomb structure. Single biome: suzaku_tomb (dark underground tomb). Accessed via a teleportation/rift from Planet Suzaku surface (not by walking). Prime Directive: the tomb and Crystal existed before Wang Lin's story; they are objective features of the planet's structure.
